_note: Air-gap/CRC reality: this lab's core loop (S2I on-cluster build -> Harbor push -> deploy built image -> rebuild) CANNOT run on CRC. The S2I builder image ${DCS_REGISTRY}/s2i-builders/python-311:1 and the ${BUILD_SOURCE_REPO} git mirror do not exist on CRC, and there is no push-capable session Harbor project, so `oc start-build` never Completes and nothing lands in the ImageStreamTag. The only step reproducible on CRC is applying the BuildConfig + ImageStream manifests and confirming both objects exist (verify-buildconfig-imagestream) -- this is independent of the build. Every check downstream of a completed Build is excluded and validated only on real DCS. Note: verify-build-complete / verify-second-build use jq (needs jq in the examiner image), but both are excluded here.

exclude.reason: on-cluster S2I build not reproducible on CRC; builder image s2i-builders/python-311:1 + BUILD_SOURCE_REPO git mirror absent, no push-capable Harbor project -- build never reaches Complete. Validated only on real DCS.
depends on a completed build pushing an image into the session Harbor project; no build + no push on CRC, so the ImageStreamTag stays empty. Validated only on real DCS.

Deployment references ${DCS_REGISTRY}/${SESSION_NAMESPACE}/hello-dcs-built:latest-built, an image only produced by the on-cluster build; it never exists on CRC, so the Pod cannot pull/become ready. Validated only on real DCS.
requires the built app Pod running behind a port-forward; the built image never exists on CRC so the Deployment never comes up. Validated only on real DCS.
requires two completed builds of hello-dcs-s2i; the build cannot run at all on CRC (builder image + BUILD_SOURCE_REPO mirror absent). Validated only on real DCS.
